'''thasupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldfangledness|oldfangledness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldfangledness|oldfangledness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsipith|thæsipith]] || [[word:thæsipij|thæsipij]] || [[word:thæsipish|thæsipish]] || [[word:thæsipi|thæsipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasusuputh|thasusuputh]] || [[word:thasusupuj|thasusupuj]] || [[word:thasusupush|thasusupush]] || [[word:thasusupu|thasusupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasuputh|thasuputh]] || [[word:thasupuj|thasupuj]] || [[word:thasupush|thasupush]] || [[word:thasupu|thasupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufputh|thasufputh]] || [[word:thasufpuj|thasufpuj]] || [[word:thasufpush|thasufpush]] || [[word:thasufpuf|thasufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasuputhu|thasuputhu]] || [[word:thasupuju|thasupuju]] || [[word:thasupushu|thasupushu]] || [[word:thasupuku|thasupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasuputh|thasuputh]] || [[word:thasupuj|thasupuj]] || [[word:thasupush|thasupush]] || [[word:thasupu|thasupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasuputhul|thasuputhul]] || [[word:thasupujul|thasupujul]] || [[word:thasupushul|thasupushul]] || [[word:thasupukul|thasupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasuputhuthu|thasuputhuthu]] || [[word:thasupujuju|thasupujuju]] || [[word:thasupushushu|thasupushushu]] || [[word:thasupuku|thasupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasuputhun|thasuputhun]] || [[word:thasupujun|thasupujun]] || [[word:thasupushun|thasupushun]] || [[word:thasupukun|thasupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasuputhuoro|thasuputhuoro]] || [[word:thasupujuoro|thasupujuoro]] || [[word:thasupushuoro|thasupushuoro]] || [[word:thasupukuoro|thasupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
